title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. trichoneura
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. trichoneura, also known as the Trichoneura rose, is a hybrid rose species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, derived from its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. trichoneura include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable plant for treating various health conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, Rosa × dumetorum subvar. trichoneura is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
